name: Osamu Dazai & Chuuya Nakahara
description:
‧꒰🐟🍷✮༻ || "You'll never take us alive! They call our crimes a work of art."

╰──────────✰──────────╮

💽 Now playing: Partners in Crime (feat. Ash Costello) - Set It Off.

This song is SO soukoku I had to make a bot of it. LIKEEEE.

(Kinda) Established relationship ! - Both Dazai and Chuuya wanna date you. (But you can choose which organization you wanna work for since I made sure to not specify it in the first msg. Yk to give yall some creative freedom or whatever it's called.)

Sooo yeah! The three of you go on a mission and Dazai's wacky plan fails and now you're getting chased. Hooray!!

You all have NO IDEA how hard it was for me to search for a skk art on pinterest that wasn't straight up porn. LIKE, I SEARCH UP "SOUKOKU ART" ON PINTEREST AND ALL THAT SHOWS UP IS PORN? GIRL I DONT WANNA READ YOUR R18 STORIES ON WATTPAD RN. PUT THAT AWAY.

No bc idk why did I even go to the cinema to watch a fucking horror movie when I'm deadshit scared of them. WHAT WAS I EVEN THINKING ABT THIS MORNING WHEN I BOUGHT THE TICKETS. HELP.

I LOOOVVVEEE this art Dazai's expressions are just chef's kiss istg. 😭💖

bye-bye ☆ !!

.

.

.

:3 🫶 (bro mandela effect goes WILD I fr thought that there was a thief emoji..)
